title: UB4 0SL, Colt Data Centre Services UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/GP3721SQ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Colt Data Centre Services UK Limited Installation name: COLT- Hayes Permit number: EPR/GP3721SQ  "
